falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout above a key resistance level would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a strong upward trend.
A sharp increase in volatility would contradict the current blowoff score and suggest a potential market reversal or panic, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 makes a new low below 4500
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below a critical support level would confirm a bearish continuation, directly opposing the pattern similarity to a prior bottom and invalidating the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
